mapper.select: select tjdate, areaflag, codecname, coalesce(bal_lj, 0) as bal_lj, sumestipaid / 10000.0 as sumestipaid, coalesce(ja_lj, 0) as ja_lj, sumpaid_lj / 10000.0 as sumpaid_lj, cast(coalesce(bal_dr, 0) as varchar(50)) as bal_dr, cast(coalesce(sumestipaid_dr, 0) as varchar(50)) as sumestipaid_dr from acd_shuiyanche_cld_hz where tjdate = ( select max(tjdate) from acd_shuiyanche_cld_hz where tjdate <= #{today} ) order by areaflag, codecname
